questions.question: Describe the key differences between a LAN and a WAN. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the scope, topology, and connection speeds of LANs and WANs

questions.question: What is the primary function of the Internet Protocol (IP)? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of IP in addressing, routing, and data transmission

questions.question: Explain the concept of packet switching and its advantages. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the benefits of packet switching in local area networks (LANs) and wide area networks (WANs)
